title: tridens hackelii
intro: Tridens hackelii, also known as the yellow sedge or hackel's tridens, is a species of grass-like plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tridens hackelii include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make infusions, teas, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
